# Introduction {.unnumbered}

## Why do we do extracellular electrophysiology?

## Neurons, spikes and the extracellular signal

## Recording from the extracellular space

### The recording set up

### High-density probes

## The acquired data

## An overview of the spike-sorting pipeline

(can introduce SpikeInterface here)

## Linking spikes to behaviour


GEneral Notes
^^CHECK THIS (LOWER) https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC3715549/#:~:text=Note%20that%20we%20here%20for,setup%20and%20the%20mathematical%20model.
https://d.lib.msu.edu/etd/10273?__goaway_challenge=header-refresh&__goaway_id=ca01fdb6671dc71b62462ce092b4bbd1&__goaway_referer=https%3A%2F%2Fd.lib.msu.edu%2F (HIGHH 1k-5k)

things to add |(section 1)

 ADD THE COMPELTELED WALKTHROUGH. SAY DON'T COPY. DONT USE AI. TYPE IT ALL.


TODO: maybe we want a 'glossary' or 'extras'
